zh.lifeSummary: Roger Cheney是Sir William Cheyne和Joane Lambourne的兒子，於1362年8月1日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾德雷頓 比奧甘。他於1385年3月之前與Agnes Charlton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1414年5月14日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾卡希頓享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cheney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Chaney   with the same etymology as in 2 below.

French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’), or a habitational name from any of several places called (Le) Cheney, e.g. in Haute-Savoie, named with this word. Compare Chesney .

French Canadian: altered form of French Chesnay or Chenay, topographic names with the same meaning and etymology as in 2 above, or habitational names from (Le) Chesnay or (Le) Chenay, names of several places in the northwestern part of France, based on Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’. Compare Chenette and Chenier 2.

variants.name: Chenette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand.
Altered form of French Canadian Chenet, itself an (intermediate) altered form of Cheney 3. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: The (majority of the) Chenettes are descendants of Bertrand Chesnay/Chenay dit/sieur de La Garenne from Brittany (France); see Cheney .

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Roger Cheney was born on 1 August 1362, in Drayton Beauchamp, Buckinghamshire, England as the son of Sir William Cheyne and Joane Lambourne. He married Agnes Charlton before March 1385. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 14 May 1414, in Cassington, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Roger Cheney est né le 1 août 1362, à Drayton Beauchamp, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, fils de Sir William Cheyne et Joane Lambourne. Il a épousé Agnes Charlton avant mars 1385. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 mai 1414, à Cassington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Cheneyは1362年8月1日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアドレイトン ビーウチャンップでSir William CheyneとJoane Lambourneの息子として生まれた。1385年3月以前にAgnes Charltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1414年5月14日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアカシントンで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Cheney(은)는 1362년 8월 1일 영국 벅잉함실르 드라이턴 보챔프에서 Sir William Cheyne(와)과 Joane Lambourne의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1385년 3월 이전 Agnes Charlton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1414년 5월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 캐징턴에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Roger Cheney nasceu em 1 de agosto de 1362, em Drayton Beauchamp, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra filho de Sir William Cheyne e Joane Lambourne. Ele casou-se com Agnes Charlton antes março de 1385. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de maio de 1414, em Cassington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Roger Cheney родился 1 августа 1362 г. в местности дреитон бочамп, буккингхамшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir William Cheyne и Joane Lambourne. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Charlton перед марта 1385 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 мая 1414 г. в местности кассингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.
